_metadata.source: Secondary source — Bike East Bay (2018) citing Berkeley City Council staff report
_metadata.attribution: Source: Bike East Bay (2018), citing city staff. Must be cited as secondary source in all public-facing uses.
_metadata.pending_verification: TIMS/SWITRS data pull not yet completed. Annual breakdown and severity breakdown are NOT available from this source. Run analysis/collisions.py when TIMS export is available to replace this file with verified data.
_metadata.years_covered: 2015–2018 (city-cited period only — secondary source does not provide full time series)
_metadata.ui_note: Components rendering this data must display a visible banner indicating figures are from a secondary source pending TIMS verification. Do not style as independently verified findings.

ped_cyclist_involvement.note: 36% involvement figure is from Bike East Bay (2018) citing city staff. Breakdown by pedestrian vs. bicyclist is not available from secondary source.
